overview.description: The Janus Henderson Equity Linked High Income ETF (JELH) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in income alternatives. JELH.L is an actively managed structured income strategy that uses derivatives to replicate the payout structure of autocallable and equity-linked notes. The laddered exposure may range across single stock, single index, and index baskets. JELH was launched on Apr 21, 2026 and is issued by Janus Henderson.
